verses.1: The word that the LORD spoke concerning Babylon, concerning the land of the Chaldeans, by Jeremiah the prophet.
verses.3: For a nation comes up out of the north against her,
verses.4: “In those days, and in that time,” says the LORD,
verses.5: They will inquire concerning Zion with their faces turned toward it,
verses.6: My people have been lost sheep.
verses.7: All who found them have devoured them.
verses.8: “Flee out of the middle of Babylon!
verses.9: For, behold, I will stir up
verses.12: your mother will be utterly disappointed.
verses.13: Because of the LORD’s wrath she won’t be inhabited,
verses.14: Set yourselves in array against Babylon all around,
verses.16: Cut off the sower from Babylon,
verses.18: Therefore the LORD of Armies, the God of Israel, says:
verses.19: I will bring Israel again to his pasture,
verses.20: In those days, and in that time,” says the LORD,
verses.21: “Go up against the land of Merathaim,
verses.22: A sound of battle is in the land,
verses.23: How the hammer of the whole earth is cut apart and broken!
verses.24: I have laid a snare for you,
verses.25: The LORD has opened his armory,
verses.26: Come against her from the farthest border.
verses.28: Listen to those who flee and escape out of the land of Babylon,
verses.30: Therefore her young men will fall in her streets.
verses.31: “Behold, I am against you, you proud one,” says the Lord, GOD of Armies;
verses.32: The proud one will stumble and fall,
verses.33: The LORD of Armies says: “The children of Israel and the children of Judah are oppressed together.
verses.35: “A sword is on the Chaldeans,” says the LORD,
verses.36: A sword is on the boasters,
verses.37: A sword is on their horses,
verses.38: A drought is on her waters,
verses.39: Therefore the wild animals of the desert
verses.40: As when God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah and its neighbor cities,” says the LORD,
verses.41: “Behold, a people comes from the north.
verses.42: They take up bow and spear.
verses.43: The king of Babylon has heard the news of them,
verses.44: Behold, the enemy will come up like a lion
verses.45: Therefore hear the counsel of the LORD
verses.46: The earth trembles at the noise of the taking of Babylon.
